demos.verse: till, fur 'z i know, there aint an inch thet i could lay my han' on,
all right,' says t'other, 'only step round smart;
who, never looking forward, are indeed
but homesick tears would fill the eyes
the limpid ocean mirrors all the stars,

signature.instructions: Classify the emotional sentiment of a poem verse.

fields.description: A line or verse from a poem
One of: negative (grief/sorrow), positive (joy/hope), no_impact (neutral/descriptive), mixed (ambivalent)
